resolution.note: Phase 6 complete. scripts/export.py produces a deterministic 10.05 MB export/guru-corpus.sql.gz in ~5s from the live 2531-chunk corpus. Six helpers + five loaders cover traditions/texts/concepts/chunks/edges/corpus_metadata with FK-ordered INSERTs, validate() pre-flight, and a monotonic corpus_version counter. Byte-identical re-export confirmed. Phase 7 round-trip test (pgvector docker load) is the next gate.
